thesis: The crowd has already capitulated and that is the long. Flow reads very_negative on FORCED-seller language (items bd-9, bd-14), narrative fear is stale not fresh, and influencer chatter has gone quiet (apathy, not new panic) - a washed-out crowd, not an ongoing flush. The Bear leans on the negative flow read as weakness, but extreme fear is contrarian-constructive here: the marginal seller is exhausted. Two distinct sources back the capitulation tone, so this is not a lone-tweet read.
key_points: flow very_negative on capitulation/forced-seller tone (items bd-9, bd-14) = exhausted sellers
narrative fearful is STALE - no new bearish catalyst this window
influencer attention faded to apathy = panic has passed, contrarian-constructive
two sources (forums, reddit) back the read - clears lone-source over-conviction
